description: Knowledge Lab 內容充實：補強 knowledge items / topics / links / vocab sets / retrieval surfaces，不改主線 artifact contract。
constraints: Must not change source-build artifact contract used by frontend intake.
Must not block LEARNING_LIBRARY_CONTENTKO_MIGRATION or MODULAR_VIEWER_REFACTOR.
Schema changes require separate review and must not be bundled into enrichment execution.

tasks.desc: Source Inventory: Audit reports/libraries in curriculum-source for reference-book suitability.
Canonical Mapping: Define rules for mapping Markdown/JSON sources to core/i18n packs.
Wave 1: Execute Batch 001 small migration (35-40 items) to verify mapping quality.
Wave 2-3: Bulk ingestion of Beginner Grammar and Core Connectors.
Wave 4-5: Ingestion of Survival Patterns and connective endings.
